name: GPT-5.1 Pro
tagline: OpenAI's GPT-5.1 Pro: the extended-reasoning ChatGPT tier that thinks longer for clearer answers on complex work.
seoTitle: GPT-5.1 Pro: OpenAI's Pro Reasoning Model
metaDescription: GPT-5.1 Pro is OpenAI's extended-reasoning model in ChatGPT Pro, released Nov 19, 2025. It replaced GPT-5 Pro, using extra compute for clearer answers on hard…
overview: GPT-5.1 Pro is OpenAI's highest-capability reasoning tier in the GPT-5.1 generation, released on November 19, 2025, one week after GPT-5.1 Instant and GPT-5.1 Thinking. It replaced GPT-5 Pro and is the extended-reasoning Pro variant: it spends more test-time compute to think longer and return clearer, more capable answers on complex, research-grade work.

GPT-5.1 Pro was offered inside ChatGPT to Pro-tier subscribers rather than through the OpenAI API — unlike the standard GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex models, which were released for developers. It inherits the GPT-5.1 family's specifications: a 400,000-token context window, up to 128,000 output tokens, a September 30, 2024 knowledge cutoff, and text-plus-image (vision) input with text output.

As a Pro model it trades speed for accuracy, dedicating extra reasoning compute per request for the hardest scientific, mathematical, coding, and analytical tasks where reliability matters more than latency. GPT-5.1 Pro was later retired: on March 11, 2026 the GPT-5.1 models were removed from ChatGPT, and existing GPT-5.1 Pro conversations were carried over to GPT-5.4 Pro.
strengths: OpenAI's highest-capability reasoning tier for the GPT-5.1 generation
Uses extended test-time compute for clearer, more reliable answers on complex work
Inherits GPT-5.1's 400,000-token context window and 128,000-token max output
Vision input — reasons over images alongside text
Tuned for accuracy over speed on research-grade scientific, math, and coding problems
useCases: Research-grade math, science, and engineering problem solving
High-stakes analysis where accuracy outweighs response latency
Deep multi-step reasoning over long documents and large inputs
Reviewing and verifying difficult technical or analytical work

links.label: GPT-5.1: A smarter, more conversational ChatGPT (OpenAI)

faq.a: GPT-5.1 Pro is OpenAI's highest-capability reasoning model in the GPT-5.1 generation, released November 19, 2025. It replaced GPT-5 Pro and uses extra test-time compute to think longer and return clearer, more capable answers on complex, research-grade work, trading speed for accuracy.

faq.q: Is GPT-5.1 Pro available in the API?
faq.a: No. GPT-5.1 Pro was offered inside ChatGPT to Pro-tier subscribers, not through the OpenAI API. The developer release in the same wave covered the standard GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex models, which are available via OpenAI's API.

faq.q: How do I access GPT-5.1 Pro, and what did it cost?
faq.a: GPT-5.1 Pro was available to ChatGPT Pro subscribers. ChatGPT Pro is OpenAI's $200/month plan aimed at users who need the most capable Pro reasoning models. GPT-5.1 Pro was not sold on a per-token API basis.

No. On March 11, 2026 the GPT-5.1 models were removed from ChatGPT, and existing GPT-5.1 Pro conversations were carried over to GPT-5.4 Pro. The GPT Pro line later continued with GPT-5.4 Pro and GPT-5.5 Pro.
